history.message:
Agent2 Round 1: All are true about trauma from occlusion except:
- A: Trauma to Marginalized gingiva - True, occlusal trauma typically affects areas like marginal tissues.
- B: Reversible - False, occlusal trauma generally leads to irreversible changes over time if untreated.
- C: Reduction in height of alveolar crest - True, occlusal overload can reduce the height of the alveolar ridge.
- D: No pocket - Not necessarily always true but more likely false given typical outcomes of occlusal trauma.
